text: Production Linked Incentive (PLI) Schemes: Aims to give companies incentives on incremental sales from products manufactured in domestic units. Eligibility: Manufacturers in 14 key sectors including Electronics, Pharmaceuticals, and Automobiles. Benefits: Cash incentives ranging from 4% to 6% on incremental sales. Boosts domestic manufacturing and global export competitiveness.

PM Internship Scheme: Aims to provide internship opportunities to one crore youth in top 500 companies over five years. Eligibility: Youth aged 21-24 years who are not in full-time employment or education. Benefits: Monthly internship allowance of ₹5,000 and one-time assistance of ₹6,000. Provides real-world business environment exposure.

Namami Gange Programme: An Integrated Conservation Mission to accomplish the twin objectives of effective abatement of pollution, conservation and rejuvenation of National River Ganga. Eligibility: Local bodies, industries, and residents along the Ganga basin. Benefits: Financial support for sewage treatment infrastructure, river-front development, and river surface cleaning.

BharatNet Project: The world's largest rural broadband connectivity program using Optical Fibre. Eligibility: Gram Panchayats and rural residents. Benefits: High-speed digital connectivity to over 2.5 lakh Gram Panchayats. Enables e-governance, e-health, e-education, and e-banking in rural India.

PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana: A rooftop solar scheme to provide free electricity to households. Eligibility: Households with suitable roof space and valid electricity connection. Benefits: Subsidy of up to ₹78,000 for 3kW systems. Provides 300 units of free electricity every month to 1 crore households.

metadata.ministry: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
